text: Papa ne aaj bina mujhse pooche announce kar diya ki mera rishta hamari biradari ke ek age-daraz aadmi se tay kar diya hai kyunki unhe mera inter-caste pyaar manzoor nahi. Divorcee hone ka stigma pehle hi bojh hai, isliye main apne bacchon ke future aur Papa ki 'izzat' ke khatir unse behas nahi kar saki. Apni khushi ko maar kar main unka faisla maan rahi hoon taaki 'log kya kahenge' ki baatein humare ghar ko aur na tode.

Jab Papa ko mere dusre religion wale partner ke baare mein pata chala, toh unhone saaf keh diya ki ek single mother hone ke naate ab mera koi future nahi hai aur mujhe akele hi rehna hoga. Mera dil toot gaya par main khamosh rahi, kyunki agar maine awaz uthayi toh samajh mein mere khandaan ki bachi-kuchi 'izzat' bhi mitti mein mil jayegi. Beti aur maa hone ka farz nibhate huye maine apni azaadi kurban kar di taaki rishtedar humara mazaak na udayein.

Papa ne aaj decide kar liya ki mera inter-caste love marriage impossible hai aur wo mujhe aur mere bacche ko gaon bhej rahe hain taaki shaher ki badnaami se bacha ja sake. Meri economic halat aisi nahi ki main unka virodh kar saku, aur main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se unki umar bhar ki izzat par daag lage. Apne bacche ki chhat bachane ke liye main chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon, bhale hi andar se main kitna bhi ghut rahi hoon.

Papa ne aaj achanak faisla suna diya ki wo mere bacche ko mere purane sasural walo ko saunp denge kyunki mera dusre religion mein love marriage karna unke samaj ko manzoor nahi hai. Ye sunkar meri rooh kaanp gayi, par unke samman aur community exclusion ke darr se mere muh se ek shabd nahi nikla. Ek buri aurat ka tag lagne se bachne ke liye main apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon.

Mere love marriage ke proposal ko caste mismatch bolkar thukrane ke baad, Papa ne aaj bina meri marzi sune ek aurat chhod chuke aadmi se mera rishta pakka kar diya kyunki wo dowry nahi maang rahe. Main apni bachi ke future ke liye pareshan hoon, par apne pita ke samne bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai. 'Log kya kahenge' aur parivaar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main khamoshi se apni bali chadha rahi hoon.
